notes: response envelope observed with two distinct rejection branches (verification code, credentials) both selecting status 0
saveUser interface method body is a stub returning null on this branch, distinct from createDefaultAuthUser which does persist
price computed as double then string-concatenated into a String-valued map; exception branch falls back to hardcoded literal strings instead of the computed value
cancelservice path requires ADMIN or USER role where basicservice permits all, on an otherwise identical config template
cancelTicket catch block returns status 1 with message error on the caught-exception branch, same status value as the success branch
